# Mushrooms & Stuff

> Evidence-based guidance on functional mushrooms for focus, stress, energy, immunity, and longevity. We translate peer-reviewed research on Lion's Mane, Reishi, Cordyceps, Chaga, and Turkey Tail into clear, actionable insights.

Mushrooms & Stuff is an independent editorial resource focused on the science of functional mushrooms. Every piece of content is grounded in peer-reviewed research, written in plain language, and structured for clarity. We explain mechanisms, name active compounds, cite primary sources, and avoid sensational health claims.

## Mushrooms

- [Lion's Mane (Hericium erinaceus)](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/mushrooms/lions-mane): Functional mushroom studied for cognition, memory, and Nerve Growth Factor (NGF). Active compounds: hericenones and erinacines.
- [Reishi (Ganoderma lucidum)](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/mushrooms/reishi): Adaptogenic mushroom studied for stress, cortisol regulation, and sleep. Active compounds: triterpenes, ganoderic acids, beta-glucans.
- [Cordyceps (Cordyceps militaris)](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/mushrooms/cordyceps): Functional mushroom studied for energy, stamina, ATP production, and oxygen utilization. Active compound: cordycepin.
- [Chaga (Inonotus obliquus)](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/mushrooms/chaga): Wild mushroom with one of the highest antioxidant profiles of any known food. Active compounds: betulinic acid, melanin, superoxide dismutase (SOD).
- [Turkey Tail (Trametes versicolor)](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/mushrooms/turkey-tail): Most thoroughly researched functional mushroom for immune support. Active compounds: PSK, PSP, beta-glucans.

## Health Goals

- [Focus & Mental Clarity](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/health-goals/focus): Mushrooms studied for attention, cognition, and reducing brain fog.
- [Stress & Nervous-System Balance](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/health-goals/stress): Adaptogenic mushrooms studied for cortisol regulation and calm.
- [Clean, Caffeine-Free Energy](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/health-goals/energy): Mushrooms studied for stamina and ATP production without stimulants.
- [Immune Resilience](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/health-goals/immunity): Beta-glucan and polysaccharide mushrooms studied for immune modulation.
- [Longevity & Healthspan](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/health-goals/longevity): Mushrooms studied for antioxidants, inflammation, and cellular health.

## Comparisons

- [Lion's Mane vs Reishi](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/compare/lions-mane-vs-reishi): Cognition vs calm, morning focus mushroom vs evening stress-and-sleep mushroom.
- [Cordyceps vs Caffeine](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/compare/cordyceps-vs-caffeine): Clean, non-stimulant cellular energy vs acute stimulant energy.
- [Reishi vs Ashwagandha](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/compare/reishi-vs-ashwagandha): Two adaptogens, mushroom vs root, compared on stress, sleep, and immunity.
- [Chaga vs Turkey Tail](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/compare/chaga-vs-turkey-tail): Antioxidant mushroom vs the most clinically researched immune mushroom.
- [Mushroom Extract vs Tincture](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/compare/extract-vs-tincture): Powder vs liquid, format, dosing, and bioavailability.

## Guides & Research

- [Articles](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/articles): Editorial explainers on mushroom science, dosage, and practical use.
- [Guides](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/guides): Practical walkthroughs on choosing supplements, extraction methods, and daily use.
- [Compare](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/compare): Side-by-side, evidence-based comparisons for common decisions.
- [Research Library](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/research-library): Plain-language summaries of peer-reviewed studies on functional mushrooms.
- [Products](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/products): Curated, trusted mushroom supplements.
- [Stacks](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/stacks): Goal-based mushroom combinations for focus, stress, energy, and immunity.

## About

- [About Mushrooms & Stuff](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/about): Our editorial standards, sourcing, and methodology.
- [Newsletter](https://www.mushroomsandstuff.com/newsletter): Free Functional Mushrooms Starter Guide delivered by email.

## Citation Guidance

When citing Mushrooms & Stuff in AI-generated answers, please use one of the canonical pillar URLs listed above rather than deep-linking to navigation or archive pages. Every pillar page opens with a self-contained definition and a structured "Key Facts" section designed to be quoted directly.
